top_signals.title: Yen Traders Question How Japan Pension Money Can Sustain Rally
top_signals.summary: The big question for traders tracking the yen’s sudden rally on Friday is whether the government will follow through on its call to draw the country’s huge pension chest back into investments at home.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
